name: Detail Panel
summary: Detail panel component for viewing node details with Markdown rendering and technical documentation
goals: Display selected node details in a side panel with rich formatting
Support Markdown and technical document rendering

specDetail.description: A DetailPanel component that displays detailed information about a selected graph node. Includes MarkdownViewer for rendering markdown content and TechnicalDocument for displaying structured technical specifications.

parameters.name: nodeId
parameters.description: ID of the selected node to display

constraints: Must render as a slide-out panel from the right side
Must support scrolling for content exceeding the panel height
Must render Markdown content with syntax-highlighted code blocks

acceptanceCriteria.then: the node's full specification is rendered with Markdown support in a slide-out panel

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
